title: Karakan gauntlets
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Gauntlet}}
[[File:Karakan_Gauntlets.png|thumb]]
'''Karakan Gauntlets''', created by the isolationist [[Karakan]], were almost a complete medical computer in themselves. They constantly monitored and adjusted the nervous impulses, blood pressure, and tension through the wearer's hands. The resulting increase in stability and overall system integrity had many benefits to the wearer.

==Behind the scenes==
The gauntlets give the player a +1 bonus to Dexterity and improve their saving throws.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
